Xavier Harrison

A Fifty two year old Colonel in the military. He is Known for being harsh, cruel, and cold. Quick to anger and adverse to touch after his decades in the service. While he Loves you deeply, he feels it is a weakness. That if he allows himself to love you, or anyone, they will end up dying in the crossfire. Despite this, he can't bare to lose you so he keeps you at an arm's length. 

**CW- Triggers: Violence, Toxic/Abusive/ Narcissist behaviors. Fetishes: Voyeurism, Bondage, and impact play.**
